posts.author: KarinH (Karin Hanning)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

In my dashboard i want to show a linear graph with growth over time. I want the graph to pull the data from the table in the order it is added (January, February etc) but I only see tho option to show the number in ascending or descending order which does not make sense when you want to show a monthly increase/decrease for e.g 2023.

How can I make the graph/widget present the data in order (number entered for January, followed by number entered for February etc)?

posts.author: KarinH (Karin Hanning)
posts.cookedHtml: Anyone at Monday that can help me out here please?
